reauth_confirm.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your SAFPIS subscriber token is no longer valid. Please enter a new token.

data_description.subscriber_token: Your new SAFPIS API subscriber token (GUID format)

reconfigure.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Update your SAFPIS subscriber token. The token must belong to the same account as the original setup.

data_description.subscriber_token: Your SAFPIS API subscriber token (GUID format)

user.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Connect
user.description: Enter your SAFPIS (South Australian Fuel Pricing Information Scheme) subscriber token. This will be validated against the API.

cities.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Cities
cities.description:
Choose one or more cities to track. There are {total_cities} SA cities containing {total_sites} fuel stations.

Leave blank to include stations from all cities, or narrow down in the next steps.

Type to filter the list.

data_description.selected_cities: Only stations in the selected cities will be available in subsequent steps.

suburbs.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Suburbs
suburbs.description:
Optionally narrow your selection to specific suburbs within {selected_cities}.

Leave blank to include all suburbs from your chosen cities.

Type to filter the list.

data_description.selected_suburbs: Select specific suburbs, or leave blank to include all suburbs from the chosen cities.

sites.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Stations
sites.description:
Optionally pick specific fuel stations within {filter_context}.

Leave blank to include every station in your chosen areas.

Type to filter by name, address, or suburb.

data_description.selected_sites: Select individual stations, or leave blank to include all stations from the chosen suburbs/cities.

fuel_types.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Fuel Types & Polling
fuel_types.description: Choose which fuel types to create sensors for, and how often to poll for updated prices.

data_description.fuel_types: A sensor will be created for each selected fuel type at each tracked station.
data_description.scan_interval: How frequently (in minutes) to fetch updated prices. The API allows a minimum of 1 minute.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the SAFPIS API. Check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid subscriber token. Please verify your token and try again.
error.forbidden: Access denied. Your token may not have the required permissions.

abort.already_configured: SA Fuel Pricing is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the SAFPIS API.
abort.wrong_account: The new token belongs to a different account. Reconfiguration must use the same account.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please restart the setup.

cities.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Cities
cities.description:
Update the cities you want to track. There are {total_cities} SA cities containing {total_sites} fuel stations.

Leave blank to include all cities.

Type to filter the list.

data_description.selected_cities: Only stations in the selected cities will be available in subsequent steps.

suburbs.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Suburbs
suburbs.description:
Optionally narrow to specific suburbs within {selected_cities}.

Leave blank to include all suburbs.

Type to filter the list.

data_description.selected_suburbs: Select specific suburbs, or leave blank for all suburbs in the chosen cities.

sites.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Select Stations
sites.description:
Optionally pick specific stations within {filter_context}.

Leave blank to include all stations in the chosen areas.

Type to filter by name, address, or suburb.

data_description.selected_sites: Select individual stations, or leave blank for all stations in the chosen suburbs/cities.

fuel_types.title: SA Fuel Pricing — Fuel Types & Polling
fuel_types.description: Update which fuel types to track and how often to poll.

data_description.fuel_types: A sensor will be created for each selected fuel type at each tracked station.
data_description.scan_interval: How frequently (in minutes) to fetch updated prices.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reconnect to the SAFPIS API to load station data.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please reopen options.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the SAFPIS API: {error}

invalid_auth.message: SAFPIS API authentication failed. Check your subscriber token.

update_failed.message: Failed to fetch fuel pricing data: {error}
